recommendations.title: The Well
recommendations.overview: A young restorer travels to a small village to restore a medieval painting to its former glory. She will put her life in danger due to a curse attached to the painting.

recommendations.title: The Goldfinch
recommendations.overview: A boy in New York is taken in by a wealthy family after his mother is killed in a bombing at the Metropolitan Museum of Art. In a rush of panic, he steals 'The Goldfinch', a painting that eventually draws him into a world of crime.

recommendations.title: The Thirteenth Floor
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, a wealthy man, known as Mr. Fuller, discovers a shocking secret about the world he lives in. Fearing for his life, he leaves a desperate message for a friend of his in the most unexpected place.

recommendations.title: Johnson Family Vacation
recommendations.overview: Nate Johnson, a Los Angeles man estranged from his wife and three children, decides to reconnect with his family by taking them with him on a road trip to Missouri for a big family reunion.

recommendations.title: 10.0 Earthquake
recommendations.overview: Los Angeles is about to be hit by a devastating earthquake, and time is running out to save the city from imminent danger.

recommendations.title: Killer of Sheep
recommendations.overview: An African-American man working at a slaughterhouse in the Watts area of Los Angeles leads a dissatisfied and listless existence.

recommendations.title: Home Again
recommendations.overview: Life for a single mom in Los Angeles takes an unexpected turn when she allows three young guys to move in with her.

recommendations.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Voyage of the Dawn Treader
recommendations.overview: This time around Edmund and Lucy Pevensie, along with their pesky cousin Eustace Scrubb find themselves swallowed into a painting and on to a fantastic Narnian ship headed for the very edges of the world.

recommendations.title: To Wong Foo, Thanks for Everything! Julie Newmar
recommendations.overview: Manhattan drag queens Vida Boheme and Noxeema Jackson impress regional judges in competition, securing berths in the Nationals in Los Angeles. When the two meet pathetic drag novice Chi-Chi Rodriguez — one of the losers that evening — the charmed Vid

recommendations.title: Canvas
recommendations.overview: After a heartbreaking loss, a grandfather struggling to reclaim his passion for painting finds the inspiration to create again.
